title: Step and Get
description: Step on a block and get the block.
body:
## Step and Get

This mod basically makes it so that when **people step on** **solid** blocks **it gives the player** the **block they stepped on**.

Adds a "**/step**" command that could **disable and enable the step feature**.


<details>
<summary>Warning</summary>

This mod is better alone rather than in a modpack.
But do as you wish with my mod in your modpacks.

</details>
